node.statement: MAT-DRESS-001: For finite complex matrices E and U, if `E^*E=I` and `U^*U=I`, then `(UE)^*(UE)=I`. This formalises the finite-matrix unitary dressing part of `summary.tex` §11.2 ([[def:refmap]] + unitary dressing) — the CAD-`THM-5.2.1` correspondence is to the `summary.tex` 'dressing by a fine-scale unitary preserves isometry' claim.
